notes: Thomas Alexander Burgess. Born Oct 15, 1795 in Charles County, MD. Father Thomas L. Burgess (1773-1824) died when Thomas Alexander was 28. Mother Teresa Tyre died 1860 at age 83. Married Alethia Caroline Burgess on Feb 4, 1830. Lived at Hill Top, Charles County. Children: Sarah (1835), Louisa (1839), Artances (1841), Benjamin Franklin (1845-1894). Brothers: Robert L. Burgess (1805), Francis Boucher Franklin Burgess (1810-1865). Wife Alethia died Jun 23, 1861. Thomas died Oct 11, 1861 — just 4 months after his wife. Son Benjamin was 16.
